tasks.prompt: Debug an intermittent slice timeout incident. Triage the codebase, investigate the failure path, and validate the fix.

context.raw: The checkout fixture repo has src/cart.js (cart building), src/discounts.js (promo/discount logic), src/shipping.js (shipping estimation), src/orders.js (order placement), src/audit.js (audit output), and src/catalog.js (product lookup). An intermittent timeout appears when orders are placed with large carts and multiple discounts. Investigate the cart construction and order placement flow.
context.sdl: Slice: cart.buildCart -> discounts.resolvePromo -> orders.placeOrder. Investigate tax calculation and order serialization paths for timeout under load.

workflow.goal: Localize the highest-impact code paths quickly.
workflow.prompt: Triage: identify the primary modules and likely risk hotspots for the timeout.

workflow.goal: Trace control/data flow across the relevant components.
workflow.prompt: Investigate: follow the cart-to-order flow and find the likely failure point.

workflow.goal: Define verification criteria and regression checks.
workflow.prompt: Validate: list the tests and checks that prove the timeout is resolved.

tasks.prompt: Harden order placement and audit output against token exposure and mutation. Investigate the security boundary, then validate.

context.raw: src/orders.js places in-memory orders and src/audit.js serializes them. Security review found raw payment token storage and mutable listOrders.
context.sdl: Hot path: orders.placeOrder stores paymentToken; audit.auditOrder prints it. Replace with fingerprint and defensive copies.

workflow.goal: Identify security risks in the order/audit flow.
workflow.prompt: Triage: list the security risks in order placement and audit output.

workflow.goal: Trace the token exposure path end to end.
workflow.prompt: Investigate: trace how the payment token flows from placeOrder to auditOrder.
